zh.lifeSummary: 當Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven於1516年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德普爾圖加阿爾時，她的父親Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven26歲，母親Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden16歲。她與Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel在荷蘭藍德布盧易尼茲培結婚。他們至少是12個女兒的父母。她去世於1591年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven于1516年出生在荷兰-拉藍德普爾圖加阿爾时，她的父亲Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven26岁，母亲Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden16岁。她与Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel在荷兰藍德布盧易尼茲培结婚。他们至少是12个女儿的父母。她去世于1591年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Dirven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kirwan  . Now found chiefly in Lancashire, England.

variants.name: Kirwan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donal, Brendan, Ronan.

Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ciardhubháin ‘descendant of Ciardhubhán’, a personal name based on ciar ‘dark’ + dubh ‘black’ + the diminutive suffix -an. This name and its variants are also found in Lancashire, England (see Kirvan , Kirven , Kirvin , Kirwin ). Compare Carawan .

nameMeanings.name: Aleijt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Mathijs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian: learned doublet of   Mads .

variants.name: Mathies
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

variants.name: Matthias
meanings: New Testament Greek form of the Hebrew name Mattathia ( see Matthew ), or rather of an Aramaic derivative. The Latin form of the name is Matthaeus. In English the form Matthias is used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament to distinguish the disciple who was chosen after the treachery of Judas to make up the twelve (Acts 1:23–26) from the evangelist Matthew. However, this distinction is not observed in other languages, where Matthias (or a version of it) is often a learned doublet existing alongside a vernacular derivative.

historicEvents.description: The Catholic King Charles I of Spain ruled the Netherlands.
William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.
The siege of Leiden between the rebels and the Spanish. 1574 The dikes were opened allowing a Dutch fleet to sail over the flood waters and rescue Leiden.

The Union of Utrecht brought together seven northern, Protestant provinces of the Netherlands against the Catholics. Known as the United Provinces, they become the foundation of the Dutch Republic. The Treaty of Utrecht was signed, marking the beginning of the Dutch Republic.
The Dutch declared their independence from Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven was born in 1516, in Poortugaal, South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven, was 26 and her mother, Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden, was 16. She married Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel in Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zeeland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 12 daughters. She died after 1591, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven est née en 1516, à Poortugaal, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel à Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zélande, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 12 filles. Elle est décédée après 1591, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven 1516 in Poortugaal, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven 26 und ihre Mutter Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden 16. Sie hat in Zijpe, Bruinisse, Seeland, Niederlande Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1591 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven è nata il nel 1516 nel Poortugaal, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel nel Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zelanda, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figlie. Morì dopo il 1591, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirvenが1516年にオランダズイド-hオランドポオルトゥガアルで生まれた時，父Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirvenは26歳，母Adriane Jansdr van den Beemdenは16歳であった。オランダゼエランドブルイニッセズイジペでJan Cornelisz Doens van Drielと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の娘の親であった。彼女は1591年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven(이)가 1516년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 포어투가앨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 네덜란드 제랜드 브루이니스 지즈에서 Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1591년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven nasceu em 1516, em Poortugaal, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel em Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zelandia, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1591, em sua cidade natal.

ro.Zijpe: Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zeeland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven родилась в 1516 г. в местности пуртугааль, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel в местности зиджп, бруинисс, зиланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 12 дочерей. Она умерла после 1591 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven nació en 1516, en Poortugaal, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel en Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zeeland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijas. Murió después de 1591, en su pueblo.
